debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
labels : List α
label : α
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label (buildBST α labels) = true ↔ label ∈ labels

failed_attempts:
rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels with
  | nil => simp [LabelledTree.mem, buildBST]
  | cons x xs ih => simp [LabelledTree.mem, buildBST, LabelledTree.addLabel, ordered_addLabel, ih]
induction labels <;> simp [*, fastCheckMem_correct, buildBST_ordered, buildBST]
rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ (buildBST_ordered labels)]; induction labels <;> simp [*, LabelledTree.mem, buildBST]

rw [fastCheckMem_correct label (buildBST labels) (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels <;> simp [*, buildBST]

rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ _ (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels with
  | nil => grind
  | cons x xs ih => grind

rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ _ (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels with
  | nil => simp [buildBST, LabelledTree.mem]
  | cons h t ih => simp [buildBST, LabelledTree.mem, ih, ordered_addLabel, LabelledTree.addLabel]
induction labels <;> simp [fastCheckMem_correct, buildBST_ordered, buildBST, addLabel, *]

rw [fastCheckMem_correct label (buildBST labels) (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels <;> sorry

rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ _ (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels
  case nil =>
    sorry
  case cons x xs ih =>
    sorry

rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ _ (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels
  · simp [LabelledTree.mem]
  · simp [LabelledTree.mem, *]

rw [fastCheckMem_correct label (buildBST labels) (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels <;> simp [*, addLabel]

rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ _ (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels with
  | nil => simp [LabelledTree.mem, buildBST]
  | cons x xs ih => simp [LabelledTree.mem, LabelledTree.addLabel, ih, buildBST]

rw [fastCheckMem_correct _ _ (buildBST_ordered labels)]
  induction labels with
  | nil => simp [buildBST, LabelledTree.mem]
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp [buildBST, LabelledTree.mem, LabelledTree.addLabel] at *
    sorry
induction labels generalizing label <;> simp [fastCheckMem_correct, buildBST_ordered, *]
